config.script:
#include "50200"
'qxx_publication #include "50217"
'realize publication #include "50518"
'MessageBox #include "50122"
class cn5platnosc_oper_config public m_strName public m_cCreateTask
public m_idObjDPC_1 public m_idObjDPC_2 public m_eTypRej
public property get is_empty() is_empty = (m_cCreateTask = "0") and _ (m_idObjDPC_1 = clng(0)) and _ (m_idObjDPC_2 = clng(0)) end property
public sub class_initialize() m_strName = "" m_cCreateTask = "0" m_idObjDPC_1 = 0 'no DP to perform m_idObjDPC_2 = 0 'no DP to perform end sub
public sub load_from_string(byref strConfig) dim aItems : aItems = split(strConfig, vbTab) 'db4 - OK if ubound(aItems) = 3 then m_strName = aItems(0) m_cCreateTask = left(aItems(1),1) m_idObjDPC_1 = clng(aItems(2)) m_idObjDPC_2 = clng(aItems(3)) end if end sub
public function save_to_string save_to_string = doc_.afc.convert.formatter("%1"+vbTab+"%2"+vbTab+"%3"+vbTab+"%4") _ (m_strName)(cstr(m_cCreateTask))(cstr(m_idObjDPC_1))(cstr(m_idObjDPC_2)).done() end function
public sub show_config_page dim pPage : set pPage = doc_.getpagehli("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=THIS_FILE")
pPage.topelement.title = "Konfiguracja operacji """ + m_strName + """"
pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_CREATE_TASK).value = m_cCreateTask 'todo: otwieranie i wybór
dim strPubType : strPubType = ""
select case m_eTypRej case N5REJESTRDOK_KASOWY strPubType = "N5DPC_PUBTYPE_KP,N5DPC_PUBTYPE_KW,N5DPC_PUBTYPE_RAPORT_KASOWY" case N5REJESTRDOK_BANKOWY strPubType = "N5DPC_PUBTYPE_POLECPRZELEWU,N5DPC_PUBTYPE_POLECPRZELEWU_ZUS,N5DPC_PUBTYPE_POLECPRZELEWU_US,N5DPC_PUBTYPE_RAPORT_KASOWY" case N5REJESTRDOK_KOMPENSATY strPubType = "N5DPC_PUBTYPE_KOMPENSATA" end select
setup_choose_dpc_pic pPage,CTRLID_PIC_DPC_1,CTRLID_DPC_1_PREVIEW,CTRLID_DPC_1,m_idObjDPC_1,strPubType setup_choose_dpc_pic pPage,CTRLID_PIC_DPC_2,CTRLID_DPC_2_PREVIEW,CTRLID_DPC_2,m_idObjDPC_2,strPubType setup_choose_dpc_label pPage,CTRLID_DPC_1,abs(m_idObjDPC_1) setup_choose_dpc_label pPage,CTRLID_DPC_2,abs(m_idObjDPC_2) setup_choose_dpc_preview pPage , CTRLID_DPC_1_PREVIEW , m_idObjDPC_1 setup_choose_dpc_preview pPage , CTRLID_DPC_2_PREVIEW , m_idObjDPC_2
if pPage.domodalauto() = CMD_CHOICE then m_cCreateTask = pPage.ctrl(CTRLID_CREATE_TASK).value m_idObjDPC_1 = get_choosen_dpc(pPage,CTRLID_PIC_DPC_1,CTRLID_DPC_1_PREVIEW) m_idObjDPC_2 = get_choosen_dpc(pPage,CTRLID_PIC_DPC_2,CTRLID_DPC_2_PREVIEW) end if end sub public sub perform_operation(byref pObject , byref pPage) perform_operation_on_config Me, pObject , pPage end sub end class
class cn5platnosc_dok_config private m_aOperations(COUNT_OPERATIONS_INX) private m_eTypRej
public function is_empty(byval nNumOper) dim pOperConf:set pOperConf = m_aOperations(nNumOper) is_empty = pOperConf.is_empty end function
public sub class_initialize() dim i for i = 0 to COUNT_OPERATIONS set m_aOperations(i) = new cn5platnosc_oper_config next end sub
public sub setTypeRej(eTypRej) m_eTypRej = eTypRej dim i for i = 0 to COUNT_OPERATIONS m_aOperations(i).m_eTypRej = m_eTypRej next end sub
public sub init_with_defaults(nTypRej) dim i for i = 0 to COUNT_OPERATIONS set m_aOperations(i) = new cn5platnosc_oper_config next
setTypeRej nTypRej
select case nTypRej ' case N5REJESTRDOK_RAP_KAS_PRZYCH ' m_aOperations(2).m_strName = "Wydruk KP" ' 'todo: wyszukanie publikacji: m_aOperations(1).m_idObjDPC_1 ' case N5REJESTRDOK_RAP_KAS_ROZCH ' m_aOperations(2).m_strName = "Wydruk KW" ' 'todo: wyszukanie publikacji: m_aOperations(1).m_idObjDPC_1 ' case N5REJESTRDOK_RAP_BANK_ROZCH ' m_aOperations(2).m_strName = "Polecenie przelewu" ' 'todo: wyszukanie publikacji: m_aOperations(1).m_idObjDPC_1 ' m_aOperations(3).m_strName = "Polecenie przelewu US" ' 'todo: wyszukanie publikacji: m_aOperations(1).m_idObjDPC_1 ' m_aOperations(4).m_strName = "Polecenie przelewu ZUS" ' 'todo: wyszukanie publikacji: m_aOperations(1).m_idObjDPC_1 end select end sub
public sub load_from_string(byref strConfig) dim aItems : aItems = split(strConfig, REJDOK_CONG_SEPARATOR) dim i dim last : last = ubound(aItems) if last > COUNT_OPERATIONS then last = COUNT_OPERATIONS end if for i = 0 to last m_aOperations(i).load_from_string aItems(i) next end sub
public function save_to_string dim strTotal : strTotal = "" dim i for i = 0 to COUNT_OPERATIONS strTotal = strTotal + m_aOperations(i).save_to_string() + REJDOK_CONG_SEPARATOR next save_to_string = strTotal end function
public property get operation_name(byval nOperNr) operation_name = m_aOperations(nOperNr).m_strName end property public property let operation_name(byval nOperNr,byref strName) m_aOperations(nOperNr).m_strName = strName end property
public sub show_config_page(byval nOperNr) m_aOperations(nOperNr).show_config_page end sub public sub perform_operation(nOperNr,byref pObject,byref pPage) #ifdef _DEBUG trans_.message 1002 , 0 , "DEBUG: " + cstr(operation_name(nOperNr)) #endif m_aOperations(nOperNr).perform_operation pObject , pPage end sub end class
function create_config_object(byref pRejestr) dim pNewConfig : set pNewConfig = new cn5platnosc_dok_config pNewConfig.setTypeRej pRejestr.eTyp
set create_config_object = pNewConfig end function
'--------------------------- config page ------------------ function fok page_.result = CMD_CHOICE page_.goback end function
function fcancel page_.goback end function
'--------------------------- perform operation ------------------ private sub perform_operation_on_config(byref pConfig,byref pPlatnosc , byref pPage) if not make_task_on_platnosc(pConfig.m_cCreateTask,pPlatnosc,pPage) then exit sub end if
if not make_publication_on_platnosc(pConfig.m_idObjDPC_1,pPlatnosc,pPage) then exit sub end if
if not make_publication_on_platnosc(pConfig.m_idObjDPC_2,pPlatnosc,pPage) then exit sub end if end sub
private function make_task_on_platnosc(cCreateTask,byref pPlatnosc,byref pPage) : make_task_on_platnosc = true
if cCreateTask = "0" then exit function end if
if pPage.std_fsave_external_with_saveobjects() then make_task_on_platnosc = false end if
end function
private function make_publication_on_platnosc(idObjDPC,byref pPlatnosc , byref pPage) : make_publication_on_platnosc = true 'todo dla pPlatnosc.pRejestrDok.m_eTypRej = N5REJESTRDOK_RAP_BANK_ROZCH 'dawać ostrzeżenie yes/no jeśli typ publikacji 'jest przelew ZUS a podmiot nie jest ZUSem 'albo przelew US a podmiot nie jest USem
if idObjDPC = 0 then exit function end if
if not pPage.std_fsave_external_with_saveobjects() then make_publication_on_platnosc = false exit function end if
'---------------------------------------- if (not pPlatnosc is nothing) and is_email_publication(idObjDPC) then
if pPlatnosc.type = TYPEID_N5RAPKAS then trans_.message 0,0,"Z raportu kasowego nie można wysłać maila" exit function end if dim pM60153:set pM60153 = doc_.getmodule(60153) pM60153.choose_mail pPlatnosc.idobj,pPlatnosc.wrefpodmiot.idobj,pPlatnosc.type
if pM60153.get_g_sStrMail="" then MessageBox "Nie wysłano maila ... ","Informacja...", vbOKOnly, vbInformation else dim adresyEmail:adresyEmail=pM60153.get_g_sStrMail make_publication_on_platnosc = realize_email_publication(abs(idObjDPC),pPlatnosc,adresyEmail,pPlatnosc.text,nothing) end if else #ifdef APPCONFIG_NIEZMIENNE_WYDRUKI if pPlatnosc.type = TYPEID_N5PLATNOSC then if pPlatnosc.pRejestrDok.eTyp = N5REJESTRDOK_KASOWY then dim nIdDok: nIdDok = get_publication_file_id(abs(idObjDPC),pPlatnosc) if nIdDok > clng(0) then trans_.var(GVAR_CURRENT_DPC_IDOBJ) = clng(abs(idObjDPC)) read_publication_file nIdDok, pPlatnosc else make_publication_on_platnosc = (realize_publication(ABS(idObjDPC),pPlatnosc,idObjDPC>0,nothing) = 0) write_publication_file abs(idObjDPC), pPlatnosc end if else make_publication_on_platnosc = (realize_publication(ABS(idObjDPC),pPlatnosc,idObjDPC>0,nothing) = 0) end if else make_publication_on_platnosc = (realize_publication(ABS(idObjDPC),pPlatnosc,idObjDPC>0,nothing) = 0) end if #else dim oDok: set oDok = pPlatnosc if oDok.type = TYPEID_N5PLATNOSC then dim oPub: set oPub = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5DPC,abs(idObjDPC)) if not oPub is nothing then if oPub.ePubType = N5DPC_PUBTYPE_RAPORT_KASOWY and not pPlatnosc.plat_pRapKas is nothing then 'przekaż do wydruku raport kasowy (10158) a nie płatność (10150) set oDok = pPlatnosc.plat_pRapKas end if end if end if make_publication_on_platnosc = (realize_publication(ABS(idObjDPC),oDok,idObjDPC>0,nothing) = 0) #endif end if
'---------------------------------------- end function
VBG_FUNCTIONS_NIEZMIENNE_WYDRUKI(zak_listZalacznik) '---------------------------------------------------------------------------------

page.body:
QXF_BEGIN QXS_BEGIN_FLAT(SECID_ALL,Konfiguracja,FORM_SPAN)
QXX_CHOOSE_PUBLICATION(CTRLID_DPC_1,CTRLID_PIC_DPC_1,CTRLID_DPC_1_PREVIEW,1)
QXX_CHOOSE_PUBLICATION(CTRLID_DPC_2,CTRLID_PIC_DPC_2,CTRLID_DPC_2_PREVIEW,1)
QXR_SEPARATOR(2) #comment NEXTVERSION - wywalic hide
QXC_LABEL(Zdarzenia,1)
zapamiętaj zdarzenie
QXR_SEPARATOR(FORM_SPAN)
QXS_END_FLAT(FORM_SPAN) QXF_END
XFDIALOGBUTTONS
